description_long: This is a large, blue plastic barrel with a capacity of 50 liters, as indicated by the embossed marking on its side. The barrel features a wide, round body with a slightly textured surface and a robust, black screw-on lid secured by two heavy-duty plastic side handles with integrated locking mechanisms. The lid is flat and reinforced with a series of raised ridges for added strength and grip. The handles are attached to the upper sides of the barrel and are designed for easy lifting and secure closure. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for storing or transporting liquids or bulk materials. This type of barrel is commonly used in urban, industrial, or warehouse settings for storage, waste collection, or transport of chemicals and other substances.
description: A large blue plastic barrel with a black screw-on lid, side handles, and a 50L capacity marking. It is sturdy, textured, and designed for secure storage or transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 50L marking, black lid, and both side handles with locking mechanisms visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the plastic side handles and the smooth, curved body without the 50L marking.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the 50L marking and both side handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other handle and the unmarked, curved surface.
